name: 7 Grain- Rice and Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups AM Brown Wild Rice & Herbs (Quick), cooked and cooled
16 ounces Canned peas and carrots, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss all ingredients together with mayonnaise or salad dressing of choice.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Serve on a bed of alfalfa sprouts.
